testcase.name: searchFlightTest

error.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: By.xpath: //div[@role='listbox']//li[contains(.,'Delhi')] (tried for 20 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.21.0', revision: '79ed462ef4' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.10' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 148.0.7778.168, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 148.0.7778.178 (d096af1c9e9..., userDataDir: C:\Users\DELL\AppData\Local...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:52314}, goog:processID: 26808, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:52314/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 148.0.7778.168, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 553a91d631f6cac1b3d8e8e5fd61d594
